prose:
Method–provenance block
• Property: HOMO–LUMO (Koopmans) gap, eV  
• Level of theory: DFT tier ‘standard’ = B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting (PySCF backend)  
• Geometry provenance: fixed geometry supplied by user file /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz (O₂ gas-phase bond length not re-optimized at DFT; single-point calculation → notation B3LYP/def2-TZVP//user xyz)  
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit or explicit solvation)  
• Charge & multiplicity: 0, 3 (open-shell triplet → unrestricted KS)  
• Software: PySCF (invoked through chemkit frontier-orbitals skill; see CLI below)  
• Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 7 cycles; no warnings reported by engine; integrity.status = “ok”, trustworthy = true.  

Headline numerical results (energies in eV)
– HOMO energy (α, β degenerate): −8.8739616  
– LUMO energy (α, β degenerate): −3.5859031  
→ HOMO–LUMO gap: **5.2880586 eV**

Koopmans-derived quantities
– Vertical ionisation potential (−ε_HOMO): 8.8739616 eV  
– Vertical electron affinity (−ε_LUMO): 3.5859031 eV  
– Electronegativity (χ): 6.2299323 eV  
– Chemical hardness (η): 2.6440293 eV

Reproducibility
• Command actually run (from result JSON):
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 3 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpbrflsphy/live.json
• Result JSON: /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpbrflsphy/live.json  
• A live engine log (.out) was written alongside the run; use `tail -f` to monitor SCF progress in real time.

No warnings were issued by the engine during this run.

(All data are computed; no experimental comparison requested.)
